full_text:
Wen Ping (Zhongye) 文聘 (仲業)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wen Ping (文聘), styledZhongye (仲業), was born in Wan in Nanyang. After Liu Cong’s surrender he secluded himself in shame. Later served Cao Cao. Wen Ping was affiliated with Liu Biao and the Wei Kingdom.
